generated_from: V3.2 static checkout scan with E53/E58/E59/E60 paths merged into native flows

status_semantics.proven: Direct call edges are visible and at least one current test traverses the important path.
status_semantics.partially_proven: Code is wired and partially tested, but hardware/dynamic/runtime boundary remains.
status_semantics.to_verify: No direct caller/test proves the link; implied, optional, or dynamic.
